description: Style Notescullers is a celebration of life at its fullest, most unusual and least expected. Scullers is for those who take life on with self-assurance and soul. This is brought about with these dashing black trousers for women. Commendably paired with a lighter top or just the right tee, look your best and celebrate life with Scullers.Product DetailsBlack trousers with button fastening and full metal zipper, loops at the waistband, side pockets on wither side and patch pockets on rear.Material and Care98% cotton and 2% elastaneMachine or hand wash separatelyUse mild detergent onlyDo not bleach or wringDry in shadeSize and FitSlim fitThe model (height 5'8" and waist 30") is wearing a size 30
